Home / Pre-Construction Services
Services

Pre-Construction Services

Strategic planning and value engineering that sets your project up for success from day one.

Start Your Project on the Right Foot

At Northway, we understand that every project is different and we can work with you to ensure your project starts off on the right foot. Our 20+ years of experience in the commercial construction industry gives us insights into the design of a project that will result in a superior project for a superior value.

The pre-construction phase is where great projects are made—or where costly mistakes are baked in. Our comprehensive pre-construction services identify opportunities, eliminate risks, and optimize every aspect of your project before the first shovel hits the ground.

What We Provide

Comprehensive Pre-Construction Planning

Project Budgeting

Accurate, detailed cost estimates based on real-world experience and current market conditions. We provide transparent budgeting that helps you make informed decisions and avoid surprises down the line.

Value Engineering

Our team reviews your design to identify cost-saving opportunities without compromising quality. We leverage our extensive construction knowledge to suggest alternatives that deliver better value.

Scheduling & Phasing

Detailed project timelines that account for permitting, procurement, construction sequencing, and your business operations. We create realistic schedules that keep your project moving efficiently.

Design Coordination

We work directly with your architects and engineers to ensure constructability, resolve conflicts early, and integrate practical construction insights into the design process.

Permit Management

Navigating local building codes and permit processes across Washington and Utah. We handle the paperwork, coordination with authorities, and ensure all regulatory requirements are met.

Site Analysis

Comprehensive site feasibility studies examining access, utilities, soil conditions, and other factors that impact construction. We identify challenges early when solutions are less expensive.

Our Approach

The Pre-Construction Process

1. Initial Consultation

We meet with your team to understand your vision, goals, timeline, and budget parameters. This discovery phase allows us to align our approach with your specific needs.

2. Design Review & Analysis

Our experienced team reviews architectural plans and specifications, providing constructability input and identifying potential issues before they become expensive problems.

3. Value Engineering

We analyze the design for opportunities to optimize costs through alternative materials, methods, or approaches—always maintaining quality and meeting your functional requirements.

4. Budget Development

Detailed cost estimates broken down by system and trade, giving you transparency and control. We provide multiple scenarios when applicable so you can make informed decisions.

5. Schedule Planning

Comprehensive project timelines accounting for design completion, permitting, procurement lead times, and construction phases. We build in realistic contingencies and coordination points.

6. Final Proposal

A complete pre-construction package including refined budgets, schedules, value engineering recommendations, and a clear path forward to construction. You'll have everything needed to make confident decisions.

Why Invest in Pre-Construction Services?

10-20%
Average Cost Savings
30%
Fewer Change Orders
15%
Faster Project Delivery

Quality pre-construction planning is the most cost-effective investment you can make in your project. The problems we solve on paper cost pennies compared to the dollars they'd cost in the field. Our clients consistently report that our pre-construction services deliver returns of 5-10X the investment through avoided mistakes, optimized designs, and smoother construction.

Beyond cost savings, comprehensive pre-construction services reduce project risk, accelerate timelines, and give you confidence that your project is built on a solid foundation of planning and expertise.

Common Questions

Pre-Construction FAQs

What is included in pre-construction services?

Our pre-construction services include comprehensive project budgeting, value engineering analysis, detailed scheduling, design coordination with architects and engineers, permit acquisition and management, site feasibility studies, and constructability reviews. We work closely with you from concept through design development to ensure your project is positioned for success.

How does value engineering save money?

Value engineering is a systematic approach where we review your project design to identify opportunities for cost savings without sacrificing quality or functionality. Drawing on 20+ years of construction experience, we can suggest alternative materials, methods, or design modifications that reduce costs while maintaining or even improving project outcomes. This proactive approach often saves clients 10-20% on overall project costs.

When should I engage Northway for pre-construction services?

The earlier, the better. Ideally, bring us in during the conceptual or early design phase. Early involvement allows us to provide the most value through budget guidance, design input, and constructability analysis before costly changes become necessary. However, we can provide value at any stage of your project development.

Do pre-construction services commit me to using Northway for construction?

No. While many clients who experience our thorough pre-construction process choose to continue with us for construction, there's no obligation. Our pre-construction services stand alone as valuable project planning tools that can benefit your project regardless of who ultimately builds it.

Ready to Plan Your Project?

Let's discuss how our pre-construction services can optimize your project for success.
